pi_items.source: https://www.regulations.gov/docket/EPA-HQ-OPP-2009-0361 - Official EPA Glyphosate Registration Review docket
https://www.nrdc.org - Confirmed NRDC has filed FOIA requests and litigation related to glyphosate (https://caselaw.findlaw.com/court/us-2nd-circuit/2153431.html)

pi_items.verified_value: FOIA is a real U.S. federal law enabling public access to government records
pi_items.source: Task description and established legal framework - FOIA requests for pesticide registration review documents are standard practice

privileged_info_summary: Task references real EPA docket EPA-HQ-OPP-2009-0361 for Glyphosate Registration Review (verified). Glyphosate is a real registered pesticide under EPA regulation (verified). NRDC (Natural Resources Defense Council) is a legitimate organization that has filed FOIA requests and litigation on glyphosate matters (verified). However, no explicit 'metadata' field exists in task.json. The task itself is synthetic—an agent benchmark task requiring interaction with ArkCase test system, not an actual FOIA litigation case.
